name: Boom Chain
description: BoomChain is a chain reaction game where one fire-cracker if used, has to burn all others which is the goal of this game. Here, you have to choose whick fire-cracker to burn first which can lead to a chain of fire-crackers to blast. Play wisely to burst all crackers!
instructions: Here you have to choose n blast a fire-cracker which will lead to burst all Play wisely
